stub_module_template.description: Consistent structure across all stub modules
components: Comprehensive enum definitions for domain entities
Event payload types for pub/sub patterns
StubImplementation classes throwing AppException with NOT_INSTALLED error codes

naming_conventions.files: kebab-case with appropriate suffixes (e.g., feedback.types.ts, module.json)

patterns_discovered.error_handling: AppException with 501 Not Installed status code for all stub methods
patterns_discovered.module_organization: All stubs located in src/modules/_stubs/ with consistent subdirectory structure
patterns_discovered.type_export_pattern: Types exported from dedicated .types.ts files, re-exported in index.ts

gotchas_discovered.incomplete_diff_truncation: Git diff output was truncated at 127083 characters, limiting full visibility of all stub implementations
gotchas_discovered.stub_method_consistency: All stub service methods follow identical error-throwing pattern - may need verification that this is intentional for future maintenance
gotchas_discovered.module_json_not_shown: module.json files created but not visible in diff - content and metadata configuration unknown
gotchas_discovered.dependency_on_app_exception: All stubs depend on @/core/exceptions/app.exception - this dependency must exist

discoveries.approach_outcome: SUCCESS - All 6 remaining stub modules were successfully created with complete type definitions and stub implementations following established patterns
recommendations: Verify all module.json configuration files contain correct metadata (module names, versions, dependencies)
Review stub implementation consistency - ensure all service methods use identical error handling pattern
Document the transition path from stub to actual implementation (how developers will replace StubImplementation classes)
Consider creating a base stub class to reduce duplication of AppException throwing across all modules
Validate that all type definitions align with actual business requirements for future implementation phases
Add integration tests to verify stub modules are properly exported and accessible to the application
Document the reason for 501 status code choice (Not Implemented vs other HTTP status codes)
